question: Architecture: single-page app with components (client component for interactivity), lib utilities, data files — how to structure?
decisionRule: PROJECT_SPEC.md — Data Model, UI Behavior, Required data-testid Attributes
answer: BallotTool client component with StateInfoCard, RegistrationDeadlines, PromptOutput sub-components; lib/stateData.ts for data lookup; lib/deadlines.ts for deadline calculation; lib/promptBuilder.ts for prompt generation; lib/types.ts for TypeScript types

question: Build system: webpack (npm run build) fails with WasmHash bug in Next.js 15.5.12 + Node 22.14.0. Use turbopack (--turbo flag)?
decisionRule: reasonable default — no spec coverage, pre-existing infrastructure issue
answer: Added --turbo flag to build script in package.json. Turbopack avoids the WasmHash webpack bug and produces a clean build
